---
title: &TITLE Santiago Olmo Rosas Plaza
last: Rosas
first: Santiago
people_group: postdoc
email: "santiagorosasplaza@gmail.com"
education:
  - PhD and an MSc in Biological Sciences | UNAM
subtitle: Postdoctoral researcher
description: ""
bio: "Santiago Rosas is a postdoctoral researcher at the International Laboratory for Human Genome Research (LIIGH-UNAM) in the Human Paleogenomics and Evolutionary Biology Laboratory. He holds a PhD and an MSc in Biological Sciences from UNAM, with training in bioinformatics and genomic data analysis. His research focuses on paleogenomics and ancient metagenomics, including the analysis of sedimentary ancient DNA to reconstruct past environments, the study of ancient microbial communities associated with Pleistocene megafauna, and the paleogenomic research of Mesoamerican turkeys (Meleagris gallopavo) to explore domestication and evolutionary history."
image: avatar.jpg

# Group publications
listing:
  - id: group-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

  - id: personal-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../personal_publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../personal_publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

page-layout: full # La página se muestra en ancho completo.
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round # imagen redonda
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:santiagorosasplaza@gmail.com
---

<hr>

:::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}

## Description

::: {style="text-align: justify;"}
{{< meta bio >}}
:::

<br>
::::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#group-pubs}
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Personal Publications

::: {#personal-pubs}
:::
